rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0001
rows.name:
No radioactive materials detected. No
infrared or vibration responses either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0002
rows.name: It's completely silent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0003
rows.name: Wow, awesome! This is a Doll, right!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0004
rows.name:
It's different from Earth's Dolls and from Growth
machines too. I wonder where it was made?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh man, I don't even know
what the armor material is![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0006
rows.name: What is this oppressive feeling...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0007
rows.name:
Is something emanating from this
unit making me feel this way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Something[ST:wide ]― yes, the presence of
whoever piloted it remains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0009
rows.name:
And the material composing
the core of this unit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0010
rows.name: This is dark matter[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0011
rows.name:
The only ones who can make
something like this[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: xs06080100_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what this Doll is.

rows.label: xs06080100_JNK0020
rows.name: Concern

rows.label: xs06080100_SEL0021
rows.name: Call out to Elma, who is lost in thought.

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0012
rows.name: Huh? No, I don't know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0013
rows.name: Eh? Sorry. Just thinking a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0014
rows.name:
All right, we've secured the target. Let's call
in the recovery choppers and get it out of here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0015
rows.name: Lin, please contact Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs06080100_MSG0016
rows.name: Yes, ma'am![ST:wait ]
